TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ciwidiyan, title = Ciwidiyan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ciwidiyan} }

S.FORM: alang Ciwidiyan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syuhong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 379 buwan, 864 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 526 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 338 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 53%, Truku 2%, Sakizaya 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciwidiyan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ciwidiyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ciwidiyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciwidiyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciwidiyan hya' ga Cipuypuyan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Ciwidiyan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syuhong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 379 buwan, 864 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 526 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 338 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 53%, Truku 2%, Sakizaya 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciwidiyan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ciwidiyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ciwidiyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciwidiyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciwidiyan hya' ga Cipuypuyan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiwi*ijan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjuħoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiwi*ijan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiwi*ijan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiwi*ijan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiwi*ijan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiwi*ijan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipujpujan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
